title: Add GaussianRandomProjection / SparseRandomProjection / johnson_lindenstrauss_min_dim
description: sklearn.random_projection has 2 estimators + 1 module-level helper. ferrolearn-decomp currently has none. Add as a new module random_projection.rs in this crate. johnson_lindenstrauss_min_dim is a closed-form size formula used to pick the projection dimension.
